title: Trump: '50/50' on deal or 'blow them to kingdom come' — will decide by Sunday
snippet: Trump said it was a 'solid 50/50' as to whether he would make a 'good' deal or 'blow them to kingdom come.' Will meet envoys Sunday to decide. Two sources said regional leaders on the call urged Trump to take the deal. Some leaders urged strikes to weaken Iran for better terms; others and top advisers urged taking the current deal.
tag_reason: New: Trump's 50/50 framing and Sunday decision deadline.
